raw.message: Crush your opponents, dominate the battlefield!

hook.summary: Fast-paced robot combat framed by a dense UI showcasing extensive customization options.
hook.visual_action: A multi-legged robot fires energy weapons in a desert arena while surrounded by a grid of weapon and robot parts.
hook.text_overlay: 上百款机甲武器 自由搭配

scene_flow: Initial combat sequence showing a Typhon robot firing weapons with a UI overlay of various parts.
Gameplay continues as the robot secures a 'Double Kill' against enemy mechs.
The robot advances, securing a 'Triple Kill' while the UI highlights different weapon models.
Final transition to a stylized 3D logo reveal for 'War Robots'.
on_screen_text: 上百款机甲武器 自由搭配
逼真细节 模拟真实机甲特性
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy mecha customization and tactical shooters.
